title: Unenchantable
description: A minecraft plugin that makes the mace item unenchantable
body:
[![Craftlands](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1456750543254061199/1457164304016085246/CREATE_SERVER_6.png?ex=695b0182&is=6959b002&hm=a2cb2f7c066a0720fb2c2c4731c303fe0ba9aabc6e13418454c31a8482656f0b&)](https://portal.craftlands.host/aff.php?aff=137)

This is a plugin thought of by duckiee2 aswell as designed by him.

This plugin makes the mace item unenchantable aswell as unnamable. This means that it balances the mace.

View my other plugin at https://modrinth.com/plugin/macelimiter
